Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PROPOSED INTERVENOR ENVIRONMENTAL DEFENSE FUND'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION.
APPEARANCES: Marybelle Nzegwu, Esq. & Brent Newell, Esq. of Center on Race, Poverty & The Environment 346-4179, & Adrienne Bloch, Esq. of Communities for a Better Environment 510/302- 0430 for petitioners & opposing parties; Mark W. Poole, Deputy Atty General 703-5582 for defts/respondents; Timothy O'Connor, Esq. of Environmental Defense Fund 916/492-4680 for proposed Intervenor & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion denied. Environmental Defense Fund fails to demonstrate a direct and immediate interest in the litigation. Petitioners to submit proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
